hook.say: Laura Bailey wants to voice a princess… who is a cat.
hook.show: Laura Bailey wants to voice a princess… who is a cat.

lines.say: The Critical Role star pitched herself for Peacock's new Dungeon Crawler Carl series.

lines.say: She wants to be Princess Donut, the main character's sapient feline companion.
lines.show: She wants to be Princess Donut, the main character's sapient feline companion.

lines.show: Bailey even cast her co-star Marisha Ray as another character: Samantha.

lines.say: Ray joked, “I’ll do anything. Look, Hollywood, I’ll do anything.”

onScreenTitle: LAURA BAILEY WANTS TO BE A CAT

captions.instagram: Critical Role's Laura Bailey is pitching herself for a role in Peacock's new 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' series, and she has her eye on a very specific character. She also has a co-star in mind for another… surprising role. Will her casting dreams come true? #DungeonCrawlerCarl #LauraBailey #CriticalRole #Peacock #CastingNews #VoiceActing #MarishaRay #TVSeries
captions.facebook: Laura Bailey from Critical Role has put her hat in the ring for a role in Peacock's upcoming 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' TV series! She wants to voice Princess Donut, the main character's cat companion. And she's got a role in mind for Marisha Ray too. What do you think of her dream casting?

pinterest.title: Laura Bailey Pitches Herself & Marisha Ray For 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' TV Series
pinterest.description: Critical Role star Laura Bailey is making her voice heard for Peacock's 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' TV adaptation! She's gunning for the role of Princess Donut and wants co-star Marisha Ray to play Samantha. Find out more about her pitch and the upcoming series!

youtube.title: Laura Bailey Pitches Herself for Peacock's 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' Series #Shorts
youtube.description: Critical Role's Laura Bailey has her sights set on a purr-fect role in Peacock's new 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' TV series! She wants to voice Princess Donut, the main character's sapient feline companion. Plus, she's got a surprising role in mind for her co-star Marisha Ray. Will these dream castings become a reality for the upcoming show? #DungeonCrawlerCarl #LauraBailey #CriticalRole #Peacock #Casting #VoiceActing

captions.x: Laura Bailey wants to voice a cat princess in Peacock's 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' series! She even cast Marisha Ray in a… unique role. Will their Critical Role chemistry translate to the new show? #DungeonCrawlerCarl #LauraBailey

spoken: Laura Bailey wants to voice a princess… who is a cat. The Critical Role star pitched herself for Peacock's new Dungeon Crawler Carl series. She wants to be Princess Donut, the main character's sapient feline companion. Bailey even cast her co-star Marisha Ray as another character: Samantha. She’s a sex doll. Ray joked, “I’ll do anything. Look, Hollywood, I’ll do anything.” The Peacock series was greenlit this year, with Seth MacFarlane's Fuzzy Door attached. So, will Bailey and Ray land their dream roles?
